Background

Passionate about building real-world software

I'm a B.Tech IT graduate (2026) from Goel Institute of Technology & Management, AKTU, Lucknow — Honors in Cybersecurity, GPA 8.64/10.

My focus is Java backend engineering — REST APIs, Spring Boot, Hibernate ORM, and maintainable enterprise-grade code. I delivered production systems at HCLTech and conducted software research at SAG, DRDO (Ministry of Defence).

Also a Research Associate at Blue Marble Space Institute of Science (YSP 2026), working on computational linguistics research.

Seeking full-time roles in Java development, Spring Boot, or full-stack engineering.

Work History

Experience

Hands-on engineering across enterprise and research environments.

Full Stack Developer Intern
HCLTech
Nov 2024 – Mar 2025
  • Built Instamart, a full-stack e-commerce app using Core Java, JSP, Servlets, JDBC, and MVC with MySQL, covering product catalog, cart, and order processing
  • Designed RESTful APIs for key modules following Agile sprint practices; applied Hibernate ORM and DAO pattern for clean separation of business logic and data access
  • Strengthened expertise in SQL optimization, Spring Boot fundamentals, and Dependency Injection patterns
Software Research & Development Intern
SAG, DRDO — Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India
Aug 2025 – Jan 2026
  • Benchmarked 12 software analysis tools across static analysis, dynamic analysis, fuzzing, and formal verification methodologies
  • Implemented 3 working prototypes from research papers and built a unified GUI integrating all tools into one interface, reducing multi-tool assessment time by ~40%
Embedded Systems & IoT Intern
Kalam Pragati
Mar 2025 – Jun 2025
  • Built a Raspberry Pi-based autonomous lane-following robot using Python and OpenCV with real-time sensor processing

Projects

Production-deployed applications with live URLs and real users.

★ Featured Project
Decentralized Credential Verification System
Full-stack credential platform with Spring Boot 3.2 REST APIs for certificate issuance, PDF & QR generation, bulk Excel upload. Spring Security RBAC with admin, issuer, verifier roles. Deployed on Oracle Cloud VM + Render.
Spring BootJavaREST APIsHibernatePostgreSQLReact 18MavenDocker
↗ Live DemoGitHub
@RestController
public class CredentialController {
  @PostMapping("/issue")
  public ResponseEntity issueCert(
    @RequestBody CertRequest req) {
    return service.issue(req);
  }
  @GetMapping("/verify/{id}")
  public VerifyResult verify(
    @PathVariable String id) {
    return service.verify(id);
  }
}
Instamart – E-Commerce App
Multi-module e-commerce application with authentication, product listing, cart management, and order processing. Java Servlets, JDBC, MySQL, MVC/DAO pattern.
JavaJSP/ServletsJDBCMySQLMVCDAO Pattern
